@@ -1321,7 +1321,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.1.10","title":"Bench: parser throughput + patch apply cost (core engine)","description":"Goal
- Build repeatable benchmarks for the core engine so optimization work is rigorous and gated.

Bench Corpus
- Maintain a realistic byte-stream corpus (build logs, dense SGR, markdown-ish output, unicode-heavy lines).
- Every benchmark run records corpus id/hash + git_sha so results are comparable.

Metrics
- Parser throughput (MB/s) for each corpus stream.
- Patch generation + patch apply cost under typical workloads.
- Memory footprint per 1k lines scrollback and under resize storms.

Outputs
- Machine-readable results (JSON) suitable for CI regression gates.

Acceptance Criteria
- Variance is characterized and documented; thresholds are set for meaningful regressions (p95 or distributional tests).
","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:20.414665310Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T09:16:27.091088022Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.10","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:20.414665310Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.10","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:20.414665310Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.10","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:20.414665310Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.10","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:20.414665310Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.1.11","title":"Fuzz: frankenterm-core parser and grid mutation entrypoints","description":"Goal
- Add fuzz targets to harden the parser and mutation logic.

Acceptance Criteria
- Fuzz harnesses run locally and in CI (time-bounded) with crash artifacts captured.
- Any found crashes become regression fixtures in the conformance corpus.
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:25.855515429Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:25.855515429Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.11","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:25.855515429Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.11","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:25.855515429Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.11","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:51:25.855515429Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.1.2","title":"Implement: new crate frankenterm-core (API skeleton + workspace wiring)","description":"Goal
- Add `crates/frankenterm-core` with the minimal public API surface and internal module layout.

Notes
- Keep dependencies minimal.
- `#![forbid(unsafe_code)]`.

Acceptance Criteria
- `cargo check -p frankenterm-core` passes (native).
- Basic types compile: Grid, Cell, Parser, Patch.
","notes":"Implemented crate skeleton in crates/frankenterm-core (Cell/SgrAttrs, Cursor+SavedCursor, Grid ops, Modes flags, Parser skeleton emitting Actions, Patch + Scrollback skeleton). Wired into workspace Cargo.toml. Verified: cargo check -p frankenterm-core, cargo test -p frankenterm-core.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CyanTower","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:32.893073810Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T18:49:05.512397161Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T18:49:05.512374489Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.2","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:32.893073810Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.2","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:32.893073810Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-lff4p.1.3","title":"Implement: terminal grid data model (cells, lines, cursor, modes)","description":"Goal
- Implement the core in-memory model used by the terminal engine.

Requirements
- Cell model: text (grapheme), fg/bg, attrs (bold/italic/underline/etc), hyperlink id, and width.
- Grid model: fixed columns, rows; supports efficient row clears and spans.
- Cursor + modes: wrap, origin, insert, autowrap; plus placeholders for DEC modes.

Acceptance Criteria
- Unit tests for all basic mutations.
- No panics on edge cases (min size, zero-length operations).
","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:39.421707588Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:39.421707588Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:39.421707588Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:39.421707588Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:39.421707588Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-lff4p.1.3","title":"Implement: terminal grid data model (cells, lines, cursor, modes)","description":"Goal
- Implement the core in-memory model used by the terminal engine.

Requirements
- Cell model: text (grapheme), fg/bg, attrs (bold/italic/underline/etc), hyperlink id, and width.
- Grid model: fixed columns, rows; supports efficient row clears and spans.
- Cursor + modes: wrap, origin, insert, autowrap; plus placeholders for DEC modes.

Acceptance Criteria
- Unit tests for all basic mutations.
- No panics on edge cases (min size, zero-length operations).
","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:39.421707588Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T18:50:37.880723949Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:39.421707588Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:39.421707588Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.3","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:39.421707588Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.1.4","title":"Implement: scrollback + resize/reflow policy","description":"Goal
- Support realistic scrollback and correct behavior under resize.

Requirements
- Scrollback buffer with configurable capacity.
- Clear reflow policy: what happens to wrapped lines on resize.
- Resize invariants: cursor position, viewport, selection (if any), and mode semantics.

Acceptance Criteria
- Deterministic replay fixtures for resize storms.
- Bench coverage for resize cost and memory.
","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:45.023051622Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:45.023051622Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.4","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:45.023051622Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.4","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:45.023051622Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.4","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:45.023051622Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.1.5","title":"Implement: selection model + copy extraction","description":"Goal
- Implement selection primitives (char/cell/word/line) and copy extraction from grid+scrollback.

Requirements
- Coordinate model for selections spanning scrollback and viewport.
- Word selection heuristics tuned for code and paths.

Acceptance Criteria
- Deterministic tests for selection across wrapped lines and resize.
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:49.789352547Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:49.789352547Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.5","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:49.789352547Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.5","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:49.789352547Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","title":"Implement: VT/ANSI parser state machine (CSI/OSC/SGR + edits)","description":"Goal
- Implement the output stream parser and apply mutations to the grid.

Must Support (initial)
- CSI cursor moves, erase in line/screen, insert/delete char/line, scroll up/down, set scroll region.
- SGR attributes and colors (16/256/truecolor).
- OSC 0/2 (title) (optional storage) and OSC 8 hyperlinks.

Acceptance Criteria
- Conformance fixtures from bd-lff4p.1.1 replay to exact expected grid snapshots.
- Proptest: parser never panics on arbitrary byte streams.
","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:56.955554647Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T09:18:10.202126850Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:56.955554647Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:56.955554647Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:56.955554647Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.1.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:18:10.202088217Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.1.6","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:50:56.955554647Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
